description_long: This object is a long, rectangular stone or concrete water trough, likely used for animals or as a public water point. The trough is elevated on four sturdy cylindrical legs and features a deep basin with visible greenish water or algae inside. Along one side, there is a black metal railing supported by vertical posts, likely serving as a protective barrier or guide. The base is a textured, stone-like platform, possibly simulating cobblestone or paving, which provides stability and a realistic urban setting. There is engraved or embossed text along the side of the trough, indicating its purpose or origin, and the ends of the trough are capped with solid blocks. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor urban or rural environments.
description: A long, stone or concrete water trough with a deep basin, black metal railing, and engraved text, set on a textured platform. The trough contains greenish water and is supported by four cylindrical legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the trough, the black metal railing, and the engraved text along the side.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the depth of the basin, the greenish water inside, and the alignment of the railing posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the engraved text and the four supporting legs beneath the trough.
description_view_3: End view showing the capped end of the trough, the water inside, and the adjacent railing structure.
attribute_spout_type: rectangular open trough with no distinct spout; water is accessed directly from the open basin
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing, supported by four cylindrical legs on a stone or concrete platform
attribute_signage_or_labeling: engraved or embossed text along the side of the trough, partially legible
attribute_surrounding_infrastructure: protective metal railing along one side, textured stone or concrete platform beneath
